data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name ,COUNT(DISTINCT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no) as count_mem ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance) as emer_balance ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_period) as emer_period ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_installment) as emer_installment ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance) as norm_balance ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_period) as norm_period ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_installment) as norm_installment ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance) as spec_balance ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_period) as spec_period ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_installment) as spec_installment ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.salary_amount) as salary_amount ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr) as emer_intarr ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr) as norm_intarr ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr) as spec_intarr ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.intarr_date ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_paycode,'01',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_shot,0)) as emer_shot ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_paycode,'01',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_long,0)) as emer_long ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_paycode,'01',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_shot,0)) as norm_shot ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_paycode,'01',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_long,0)) as norm_long ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_paycode,'01',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_shot,0)) as spec_shot ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_paycode,'01',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_long,0)) as spec_long
,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_paycode,'02',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_shot,0)) as normshotyod ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_paycode,'02',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_shot,0)) as specshotyod ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_paycode,'02',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_long,0)) as normlongyod ,sum(decode(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_paycode,'02',sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_long,0)) as speclongyod
FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr > 0 )
/*---------------------[ วันที่ ]------------------------*/ -- and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = to_date('2025-10-31 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control in ('01000','01002')
group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.intarr_date
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control desc ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
